steps.title: Identify what 'emphasize the order' requires
steps.content: To emphasize the order means showing which state became a state first and the temporal distance between them.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly shows the sequence
steps.content:
Choice A explicitly shows the order with “before,” includes ordinal numbers (49th, 50th), and quantifies the gap (“several months”).

Choices B and D redirect to flag information; choice C downplays the temporal gap by highlighting only the shared year.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
